new_findings.pattern: I thought I had a subscription
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about subscription confusion does not appear in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I can’t believe I waited a week for this delivery
new_findings.rationale: This expression of disbelief regarding delivery time is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.pattern: I was really expecting to have a working product
new_findings.rationale: This phrase expressing disappointment in product performance is not found in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I tried to submit a ticket for a bug
new_findings.rationale: This specific mention of submitting a ticket for a bug does not appear in real samples.
